title: session capability lookup clones serde_json::Value unnecessarily
description: Session::chat_capability and Session::websocket_capability (jmap.rs:278,300) call serde_json::from_value::<T>(raw.clone()), cloning the capability Value before consuming it. Since the map value is only borrowed (the HashMap is not consumed), the clone is structurally required by the current API, but the allocation is O(capability object size) on every call. These methods are called on each SSE state-change in handle_state_change. Switching to serde_json::from_value with a reference approach (from_str on a temporary serialization, or restructuring to take ownership) would eliminate the clone.
